parameters.query:
SELECT pn.*, u.name AS employee_name
FROM payroll_novedades pn
LEFT JOIN payroll_employees pe ON pn.employee_id = pe.id
LEFT JOIN users u ON pe.user_id = u.id
WHERE pn.period_id = $1::uuid
  AND ($2::uuid IS NULL OR pn.employee_id = $2::uuid)
ORDER BY pn.start_date

parameters.jsCode:
const b = $input.first().json.body || $input.first().json;
return [{ json: {
  id:              b.id || '',
  period_id:       b.period_id || '',
  employee_id:     b.employee_id || '',
  novedad_type:    b.novedad_type || 'licencia_ordinaria',
  start_date:      b.start_date || '',
  end_date:        b.end_date || '',
  days_count:      b.days_count != null ? String(b.days_count) : '',
  hours_count:     b.hours_count != null ? String(b.hours_count) : '',
  amount_override: b.amount_override != null ? String(b.amount_override) : '',
  notes:           b.notes || '',
  created_by:      b.created_by || ''
} }];

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO payroll_novedades
  (id, period_id, employee_id, novedad_type, start_date, end_date, days_count, hours_count, amount_override, notes, created_by)
VALUES
  (COALESCE(NULLIF($1,'')::uuid, gen_random_uuid()),
   $2::uuid, $3::uuid,
   $4::novedad_type_enum,
   $5::date, NULLIF($6,'')::date,
   NULLIF($7,'')::decimal, NULLIF($8,'')::decimal, NULLIF($9,'')::decimal,
   NULLIF($10,''), NULLIF($11,'')::uuid)
ON CONFLICT (id) DO UPDATE SET
  novedad_type    = EXCLUDED.novedad_type,
  start_date      = EXCLUDED.start_date,
  end_date        = EXCLUDED.end_date,
  days_count      = EXCLUDED.days_count,
  hours_count     = EXCLUDED.hours_count,
  amount_override = EXCLUDED.amount_override,
  notes           = EXCLUDED.notes
RETURNING id, novedad_type, start_date

INSERT INTO payroll_novedades
  (id, period_id, employee_id, novedad_type, start_date, end_date, days_count, hours_count, amount_override, notes, created_by)
VALUES
  (COALESCE(NULLIF($1,'')::uuid, gen_random_uuid()),
   $2::uuid, $3::uuid,
   $4::novedad_type_enum,
   $5::date, NULLIF($6,'')::date,
   NULLIF($7,'')::decimal, NULLIF($8,'')::decimal, NULLIF($9,'')::decimal,
   NULLIF($10,''), NULLIF($11,'')::uuid)
ON CONFLICT (id) DO UPDATE SET
  novedad_type    = EXCLUDED.novedad_type,
  start_date      = EXCLUDED.start_date,
  end_date        = EXCLUDED.end_date,
  days_count      = EXCLUDED.days_count,
  hours_count     = EXCLUDED.hours_count,
  amount_override = EXCLUDED.amount_override,
  notes           = EXCLUDED.notes
RETURNING id

parameters.jsCode:
const items = $input.all();
return [{ json: { inserted: items.length, ids: items.map(i => i.json.id) } }];

parameters.query: DELETE FROM payroll_novedades WHERE id = $1::uuid RETURNING id
